diagrams.title: 2's Complement Number Circle
diagrams.description: Visual representation of 8-bit signed numbers in 2's complement showing wrap-around

diagrams.title: IEEE 754 Single Precision Layout
diagrams.description: 32-bit floating point format showing bit allocation

diagrams.title: Binary Addition with Carry Propagation
diagrams.description: Step-by-step addition showing carry flow from LSB to MSB
elements: Carry bits shown flowing upward between columns
Each column: bit1 + bit2 + carry_in = sum, carry_out
Shows where overflow can occur in signed arithmetic
diagrams.purpose: Understanding binary addition and overflow detection

diagrams.title: Gray Code Reflection Pattern
diagrams.description: Shows how Gray code is generated using reflection/mirroring
diagrams.purpose: Understanding Gray code generation and applications
